# Zaman Ishtiyaq — Full-Stack & AI Engineer
> Portfolio of Zaman Ishtiyaq. Freelance full-stack developer and AI engineer with 7+ years of experience at Goldman Sachs, BrightEdge, and Atlan. IIT Bhubaneswar Computer Science graduate. Two iOS apps live on the App Store. Available for freelance projects worldwide.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://www.zamanishtiyaq.work): Portfolio homepage with experience, projects, and skills overview
- [Hire Me](https://www.zamanishtiyaq.work/hire): Services, pricing model, and how to start a project
- [Website Design](https://www.zamanishtiyaq.work/design): Fixed-price website design services — Starter ($299), Standard ($749), Custom (from $1,800). Landing pages, multi-page sites, and custom platforms.
- [Projects](https://www.zamanishtiyaq.work/projects): Offer X-Ray, Architex, ReelRocket, Muhasaba, Spree, Ali Saffudin, Villa Cottages
- [Blog](https://www.zamanishtiyaq.work/blog): Writing on AI engineering, agentic systems, product development, and indie apps
- [Products](https://www.zamanishtiyaq.work/products): Live products built and shipped by Zaman
- [Contact](https://www.zamanishtiyaq.work/contact): Direct contact form

## About Zaman Ishtiyaq
Zaman Ishtiyaq is a Full-Stack and AI Engineer based in Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India. He specialises in AI/LLM integration, multi-agent systems, full-stack web development (Next.js, TypeScript, React), and native iOS development (Swift, SwiftUI). He has 7+ years of professional experience including 5 years at Goldman Sachs and 2+ years at BrightEdge, and is currently an AI Native Engineer at Atlan.

## Projects Built
- Offer X-Ray (offerxray.com): AI-powered offer letter analysis tool using GPT-4 — users upload a job offer and receive risk assessment, compensation breakdown, and negotiation guidance in under 5 minutes
- Architex: Stage-based project management platform for architecture practices with AI assistant, document version control, and billing integration
- ReelRocket: AI UGC content creation platform for TikTok automation — generates hook scripts, demo video briefs, and product review content
- Muhasaba: Native iOS Islamic daily reflection app, live on the App Store
- Spree: Native iOS AI wishlist app with virtual try-on feature, live on the App Store
- Ali Saffudin: Bespoke artist portfolio website with immersive hero and interactive cassette player
- Villa Cottages: Property management platform with Google Calendar sync and Airbnb iCal bridge

## Services
- AI Automations & Agentic Systems: Multi-agent systems, LLM pipelines, and end-to-end AI automations using OpenAI Agents SDK and Temporal
- Full-Stack Web Applications: SaaS products, dashboards, and tools — Next.js, TypeScript, React, Python
- Custom Websites: Marketing sites, landing pages, and portfolio sites — see /design for packages and pricing
- iOS App Development: Native Swift/SwiftUI apps shipped to the App Store
